jobDescription: Adyen is looking for a full-time Postgre SQL enthusiast to join our team in Amsterdam. Adyen has one of the largest (real-time transactional) Postgre SQL instances in the world. Over the last couple of years we've sponsored many additions to Postgre SQL. We are looking to invest more into Postgre SQL by hiring multiple internal experts. These persons are expected to contribute to the Postgre SQL repository and keep in close contact with the community. The significance of Postgre SQL is becoming larger and larger as our business and platform are growing exceptionally fast. This excites us to contribute to the Postgre SQL as much as we possibly can. We believe it is extremely important to contribute and help further improve the Postgre SQL community because it has helped us a long way and continues to do so. As a Postgre SQL expert at Adyen you will be working closely with our development and infrastructure teams to provide them with your knowledge and understand what they are working on. This understanding and knowledge will help you develop and consult internally at Adyen with Postgres and externally to the Postgre SQL community. We expect you to represent Adyen in the Postgre SQL community and actively engage within the community. We are hence not looking for a more traditional DBA role and this position can also be described as a Distributed Systems Engineer. If this all sounds right to you and if you, like us, also care about the Postgre SQL community, please consider applying for this ( Postgre SQL expert) role. We don’t like to be very specific with requirements for this job: apply and get in touch with us if this role would make you happy and you truly think you’re the person suited to do this. About Adyen Adyen is a technology company that provides a single platform to accept payments anywhere in the world through any sales channel. Driven by a vision to improve customer experience, streamline processes, and ultimately increase revenue, Adyen enables businesses to process payments across online, mobile, and Point-of- Sale ( POS) with over 250 payment methods in 187 transaction currencies. Over 3,500 businesses use the Adyen payment platform, including Facebook, Spotify, Groupon, Evernote, Booking.com, Yelp, Vodafone, Mango, Abercrombie & Fitch, O’ Neill, and KLM. Adyen is headquartered in Amsterdam, with offices in San Francisco, São Paulo, Singapore, London, Paris, Berlin, Stockholm, Madrid, and Boston. Interested? We offer a competitive salary and great career opportunities within a global payments company. Become part of an international work environment and take your career to the next level. Our company culture At Adyen our people are our greatest asset. Our unique company culture attracts the smartest people, who take initiative & ownership and can truly contribute to our fast growth. We believe that people reach the utmost if we give them freedom, opportunities and responsibility to build Adyen. Our culture is very informal and direct. We talk straight without being rude. We are extremely customer centric. We believe in teamwork, and don’t like egos and hierarchy. When taking a decision we take them quickly but always involve others to further improve. We provide each other regular informal feedback and let everyone design their own growth path.
